    Index

    A C D E F G H I L M P R S T U V 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

    S

    saveTasks(ArrayList) - Statische Methode in Klasse utils.DataStorage
    Saves a list of tasks to an XML file using the properties format.
    setAssignees(String) - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Sets the assignees of this task.
    setDeadline(String) - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Sets the deadline of this task.
    setDescription(String) - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Sets the description of this task.
    setStatus(String) - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Sets the status of this task.
    setTasks(ArrayList) - Methode in Klasse model.ProjectModel
    Sets the entire list of tasks.
    setTimeSpentInSeconds(int) - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Sets the time spent on this task in seconds.
    setTitle(String) - Methode in Klasse model.Task
    Sets the title of this task.
    showHelpFAQ() - Methode in Klasse controller.TaskController
    Displays a comprehensive help and FAQ dialog to the user.
    sortComboBox - Variable in Klasse view.MainView
    The combo box allowing the user to sort tasks by various criteria.
    startTimerButton - Variable in Klasse view.MainView
    The button used to start the time tracking for a specific task.
    startTimerDialog(Task) - Methode in Klasse controller.TaskController
    Opens a modal dialog to track the time spent on a specific task.
    status - Variable in Klasse model.Task
    The current status of this task.
    A C D E F G H I L M P R S T U V
